name: rslint
description: Lightning-fast JavaScript/TypeScript linter built with Go and typescript-go. 20-40x faster than ESLint with minimal config, typed linting by default, and ESLint-compatible rules.

install_steps: npm install -g @rslint/cli  # or download binary from GitHub Releases

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install rslint: npm install -g @rslint/cli or download from https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rslint/releases
Install rslint: npm install -g @rslint/cli or download from https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rslint/releases

args.name: path
args.description: Files or directories to lint (default: current directory)
